title: Ambient Life
description: Adds ambient mobs, such as Roaches, Snails, and Moths.
body:
Minecraft only has Bats as ambient mobs. Ambient Life adds more ambient creatures.
Roaches spawn in caves. They are small and afraid of the player and spiders. They love bread and can be bred with it.

Moths spawn in caves. They fly around and have a brown spotted pattern on their wings, similar to the common brown house moth.

Flies spawn near animals and zombies. They fly around. That's it.

Snails spawn in birch forests and flower forests. They are slow, slimy, and can be bred with leaves. When killed they drop slimeballs.

Use code ITSSMUDGY for 25% off: https://www.bisecthosting.com/itssmudgy 

Join our Discord: https://discord.gg/hVcqt4vzbu 

Support me on Ko-Fi: https://ko-fi.com/itssmudgy
 
 

This mod requires Geckolib
